displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Ready to eat
• No cooking required

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• This is the way to enjoy Mamee Monster Snack:
1. For added flavour, toss in seasoning and crunch it!
2. Shake it! The more you shake, the better it gets
3. Munch it and enjoy

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
Wheat Flour, Carotino Red Palm Oil, Salt, Flavouring (Contains Gluten, Soya Beans), Flavour Enhancer (E621, E627, E631), Sugar, Spices, Stabilisers (E452, E501), Acidity Regulator (E296)
• Optional sachet contains additional - salt, bbq seasoning (contains milk, peanuts and soya beans), sugar, spices
• May contain traces of crustacea, fish, sesame, celery and mustard

metaData.Ingredients:
Corn, Non-Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil (Palm), Sugar, Salt, contains Monosodium Glutamate (E621), Yeast Extract, Disodium 5'-Guanylate (E627), Disodium 5'-Inosinate (E631) as permitted Flavour Enhancers, contains permitted Flavouring Substances
• Allergen advice: contains celery, soya and wheat
• Manufactured on equipment that also processes products containing milk and egg
• Food additives are sourced from plant and synthetic origin
metaData.SAP Product Name: TWISTIES MULTIPACK - BBQ CURRY (8 PACKETS X 13G) 104G

product.name: Twisties Corn Snack - Kaboom! BBQ Curry

product.description: Cheezels are the perfect popular snack for children, with more than 30 years as a catalyst for fun and excitement. Twisties have become a popular household name enjoyed by a million of people. The strong burst of cheddar cheese flavour melts into the mouth, pop them on your finger and eat one-by-one for some finger-licious fun. it comes with different flavours- original and BBQ cheese. All the flavours are carefully selected to excite the customers taste buds and cravings. It is a highly energetic fun and exciting brand that has always been at the forefront to satisfy its customer.

metaData.Ingredients:
Corn, Non-Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Rice Grits, Milk Powder, Salt, Acidity Regulators, Cheese Powder and Spices
• It contains permitted food additives of non-animal origin
metaData.Key Information:
• Cheezels are delicious cheese flavoured ring shaped snacks with finger sized hole
• Cheezels originally from Australia are made with the goodness of real cheese
• Baked to crispy, crunchy perfection and smothered with deliciously cheesy flavour
• Enjoy intense cheesy taste in crunchy ring snack
• Corn and rice are blended to form the famous Cheezels snacks
metaData.Nutritional Data:

Protein 1g
Total Fat 5.2g
Saturated Fat 0g
Trans Fat 0g
Cholesterol 0mg
Carbohydrate 8g
Dietary Fibre 0g
Sodium 145mg
metaData.SAP Product Name: CHEEZELS ORIGINAL CHEESE SNACK (8 PACKETS X 13G) 104G

product.name: Cheezels Cheese Rings Snack - Original (Multipack)

metaData.Ingredients:
Corn, Non-Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil (Palm), Milk Powder (from Cow), Salt, Acidity Regulators (E331, E330, E339), Cheese Powder (contains Milk) and Spices, contains Monosodium Glutamate (E621), Disodium 5'-ribonucleotides (E635), Yeast Extract, Disodium 5'-guanylate (E627), Disodium 5'-inosinate (E631) as permitted Flavour Enhancers, contains Permitted Flavouring Substances and Natural Colouring [Paprika Extract (E160c)]
• Allergen Information: contains milk
• Manufactured on equipment that also processes products containing wheat, soya, egg
• Food additives are sourced from plant and synthetic origin
metaData.Key Information:
• A corn snack with cheeky cheddar cheese flavour
• Contains milk

product.name: Twisties Corn Snack - Cheeky Cheddar Cheese

metaData.Key Information: Made using real potatoes, these addictive potato sticks deliver a smoky barbecue flavour and are convenient to bring around!
